sections.title: 1. PROSE: Earth, the Desolated Home
sections.content:
Story Overview

The year is 2068. Earth has been destroyed by human exploitation. Humans have colonized Mars, and India has three colonies there. Arivumathi lives in one such colony. Her grandfather visits her after traveling 1500 sols (Martian days).

Core Message: Earth is our natural home. We must protect it instead of destroying it and struggling to survive on dead planets like Mars.

Earth vs. Mars: Life Comparison

Feature Life on Earth (Past) Life on Mars (2068)
Environment Clean, natural air. Toxic; needs space suits & oxygen cylinders.
Agriculture Natural soil, tasty vegetables. Chemically treated soil, flavorless crops.
Water Rain and rivers. Burning fuels artificially.

sections.title: 2. POEM: Beyond the Universe
sections.content:
An imaginative journey through space:

  • 🌍 Earth: Leaving our blue home.
  • 🔴 Mars: Gliding past the red planet.
  • 🪐 Saturn: Ringed beauty with celestial moons.
  • 🌀 Jupiter: The giant with red storms.
  • 🔃 Uranus: The tumbling, rolling planet.
  • ❄️ Neptune: The blue ice giant.
  • 🌌 Goal: Soaring beyond the Milky Way to reach the Creator.

sections.title: 3. SUPPLEMENTARY: Lost in Space
sections.content:
Story Summary

Friends Amuthan and Nilavan accidentally launch a space shuttle from a museum. They crash-land on a distant planet. Friendly green aliens find them, repair their shuttle, and guide them safely back to Earth.

sections.title: 4. GLOSSARY (Word Meanings)
sections.content:
Sol: A Martian day
Desolated: Empty or ruined
Hub: Central living space
Space Suit: Protective suit for space
Galaxy: Massive system of stars
Milky Way: Our galaxy

sections.title: 5. GRAMMAR: Compound Words & Nouns
sections.content:
Compound Words

Two distinct words joined to make a new word.

⭐ Sun + Flower = Sunflower
⭐ Light + House = Lighthouse
⭐ Star + Fish = Starfish

Collective Nouns

Names of groups.

  • 📦 A bunch of grapes
  • 🐝 A swarm of bees
  • 🐜 An army of ants

Abstract Nouns

Things you cannot touch (Emotions, Ideas).

❤️ Happiness, ⚖️ Justice, 🏅 Honesty, 🦁 Bravery

qa.q: What is the setting of the story 'Earth, the Desolated Home'?
qa.a: The story is set in the future, in the year 2068, on the planet Mars. Earth has been rendered uninhabitable due to human actions.

qa.q: How long did it take for the grandfather to reach Arivumathi?
qa.a: It took the grandfather 1500 sols (Martian days) to travel across Mars to reach Arivumathi's hub.

qa.q: How is water produced on Mars according to the lesson?
qa.a: Unlike Earth, where water is naturally available, water on Mars is artificially produced by burning fuels.

qa.q: Name the planets mentioned in the poem 'Beyond the Universe'.
qa.a: The poet mentions Earth, Mars, Saturn, Jupiter, Uranus, and Neptune during the space journey.

qa.q: How did Amuthan and Nilavan return to Earth?
qa.a: After crashing on an unknown planet, friendly green aliens approached them, repaired their damaged space shuttle, and safely guided them back home.
